name: Manual Trigger → S3 Out
description: Run emits payload, optional filter, write JSON to S3-compatible storage
notes: Bind a storage connector on the S3 destination step. Optional Run payload JSON.

name: Scheduled REST → Webhook
description: Cron tick, pull REST, filter, POST webhook
notes: Set matching cron on schedule source and pipeline scheduleCron. Activate for poller.

name: S3 CSV → Webhook
description: Read S3 object, CSV→JSON, filter, map fields, POST webhook
notes: Needs storage + REST connectors. Prefer ioMode queue.

name: REST → Filter → Webhook
notes: Bind REST connectors on source and destination.

name: REST → Null Drop → Null Dest
description: Simple processor/util demo that discards output
notes: Good for smoke-testing without external sinks.
